SUBJECT: A Stomper Holiday Gift (I told you so)

convertlinks

OK, I hinted about this in the last Going
Natural 2.0 video...

I told you it was going to be a great
Christmas...

But I didn�t know HOW great until my
staff called me in to talk about pricing
the StomperScrutinizer.

It WAS a little strange though�

check out what happened when I got to the office !

Now it's time for you to open up your present from
StomperNet... go here now to get your free copy
of Stomper Scrutinizer.

Your web site (and your bottom line) will
never be the same. Be sure to watch
this very short video,

best regards,
Andy Jenkins

P.S. I love Christmas... but I know that lots
of people have different traditions and
different celebrations. In all seriousness, I
want to wish you a joyous and peaceful
holiday season.

It really does bring me great happiness to
have the kind of team that can pull off
something like Stomper Scrutinizer, and it's
even better to be able to give it to you as a
gift.

We've been working around the clock to finish
it in time for Christmas - and I know lots of
people were expecting a big high-priced
Product Launch... but we thought this would
be a really great surprise for you!

You can download it here.

P.P.S. And here's to a healthy and
profitable 2008!
